response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video for song title and artist text: 'Airman ga Taosenai' (Team Nekokan), 'Robo no Theme' (Yasunori Mitsuda), 'Kaeru no Theme' (Yasunori Mitsuda), 'Melodies of Life' (Nobuo Uematsu). 2. Performed searches: 'Airman ga Taosenai Team Nekokan Japanese and English lyrics', 'Robo no Theme Chrono Trigger Japanese and English lyrics', 'Kaeru no Theme Chrono Trigger Japanese and English lyrics', 'Melodies of Life Final Fantasy IX Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. 'Airman ga Taosenai' and 'Melodies of Life' had clear lyrics. 'Robo no Theme' and 'Kaeru no Theme' are instrumental in original composition; no standard canonical lyrics exist for the vocal arrangement performed in the video.
response.global_summary: The video is a concert performance featuring Japanese VTuber Hakuoi Koyori, performing a medley of songs. It starts with 'Airman ga Taosenai', followed by vocal arrangements of the 'Robo no Theme' and 'Kaeru no Theme' from Chrono Trigger, and concludes with 'Melodies of Life' from Final Fantasy IX.

scenes.description: Hakuoi Koyori and another character performing 'Airman ga Taosenai' on stage. Song title appears in the corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイ
そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
諦めずに消える足場に挑戦するけど
すぐに下におちるよ
アイテム2号があれば楽に
向こうの岸まで着くけど
何回やっても何回やっても
エアーマンが倒せないよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I noticed I keep playing the same level
And always end up dying in the same spot
I try to challenge the disappearing platforms without giving up
But I fall down immediately
If I had Item #2 I could easily reach the other side
But no matter what, no matter what
I can't defeat Airman!

scenes.description: Hakuoi Koyori performs a vocal arrangement of 'Robo no Theme'. Song credits appear at the bottom.
Hakuoi Koyori performs a vocal arrangement of 'Kaeru no Theme'. Song credits appear at the bottom.
Hakuoi Koyori and another character perform 'Melodies of Life'. Song title and credits appear at the bottom.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あてもなく彷徨っていた
手がかりもなく探し続けた
あなたがくれた思い出を
心を癒す歌にして
約束の場所へ
いつか
あなたのくれた想い出を
心を癒す歌にして
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Alone for a while, I've been searching through the dark
For traces of the love you left inside my lonely heart
To weave by picking up the pieces that remain
Melodies of life - love's lost refrain
Our paths, they did cross, though I cannot say just why
But I know that I'm glad they did, as I say goodbye
If I should leave this lonely world behind
Your voice will still remember our melody
